calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-20-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To May-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roxana Jauregui appeared by telephone for Joyce Wong.

Ms. Jauregui stated that they filed a dismissal as they found that the assets are below the $150,000.00 mark. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 20, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of the dismissal.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Continued To May-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roxanna Hunt appeared by telephone for Co-Trustees.

The Court noted that nothing has been filed addressing the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Hunt stated that the Co-Trustees found that the Decedent had shares in Prudential, that prior to that they thought the value of the estate was going to be below $150,000.00, that Prudential has been slow in acting and has not provided any documentation, and requested a 30-day continuance. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roxanna Hunt appeared by telephone for Joyce Wong and Cortina Wong.

Ms. Hunt stated that they looked in the safe deposit box, that they did not find a will, but they found additional property, that at this point they will be below the $150,000.00 mark and that they will be asking to drop the petition. Ms. Hunt also stated that the Decedent also has some shares with Prudential and that they are waiting to receive statements to verify that the amount is below the $150,000.00 mark. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Continued To Mar-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Feb-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roxana Hunt for Joyce Wong and Cortina Wong Mah (Petitioners).

Ms. Hunt stated that they only have a copy of the will, that there was a delay in getting the special letters issued, that the letters have expired and that they submitted an ex parte petition to extend the letters, but no letters have been issued. Ms. Hunt also stated that she provided notice to all of the beneficiaries, that she is requesting a continuance, that the Sisters want to get into the safe deposit box to look for the original will, and that she is requesting that the special letters be extended. In addition, Ms. Hunt stated that the real property was placed in the trust, that what they are dealing with here are a few bank accounts and that the current value of the estate is about $95,000.00. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court signed an order extending the special letters to February 25, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
